title: Romania's Outdated and Kitsch Foreign Policy Visits Washington
summary: The article criticizes Romania's diplomatic delegation to Washington, led by Foreign Minister Oana Toiu and including controversial figure Titus Corlățean, arguing that Romania's foreign policy is outdated and naively aligned with a declining MAGA movement. The author contends that Romania should pivot toward European partnerships rather than clinging to a US strategic partnership that effectively no longer exists under the current administration, while also criticizing President Nicușor Dan's lack of leadership and transparency regarding foreign interference in Romanian elections.
talking_points: Romania's Washington delegation is pursuing an outdated diplomatic strategy by courting MAGA figures who will soon become a historical mistake
The US-Romania strategic partnership effectively no longer exists under MAGA leadership, and Romania should rely on European partners for security rather than NATO under current conditions
President Nicușor Dan lacks leadership and transparency, avoiding clear positions to maintain neo-USL coalition support while failing to address foreign interference in Romanian elections

The US House Judiciary Committee's pseudo-report on EU interference in Romanian elections represents American hypocrisy, given the US's own democratic deficiencies with tech giants and uncontrolled lobbying
Any association with MAGA will bring only medium and long-term damage to Romania's interests
author: Andrei Colțea
